item.title: 微软发布七款自研模型，还有一台「梦中神机」
item.guid: 微软发布七款自研模型，还有一台「梦中神机」
item.description:
Microsoft just held its Build 2026 developer conference, where it focused on releasing its self-developed model family, local AI development devices, new AI terminal forms, and enterprise AI governance tools, demonstrating its comprehensive layout at the AI infrastructure level. 刚刚，微软举办 Build 2026 开发者大会，集中发布了自研模型家族、本地 AI 开发设备、新型 AI 终端形态及企业 AI 治理工具，宣示其在 AI 基础设施层面的全面布局。

🔗 Related reading: Just now, Windows' "dream machine" arrived, turning your PC into an Agent workstation 🔗 相关阅读： 刚刚，Windows「梦中神机」来了，把你的 PC 变成 Agent 工位

This conference launched seven MAI models at once, covering inference, code, image, speech, and transcription. 本次大会一次性推出七款 MAI 模型，覆盖推理、代码、图像、语音和转录方向。

    The inference model MAI Thinking 1 adopts a sparse MoE architecture, with 35B active parameters, a total parameter scale of about 1T, and supports a 256K token context;

    The code model MAI Code 1 Flash is trained end-to-end by Microsoft, scoring 51.2% on SWE Bench Pro, higher than Claude Haiku 4.5's 35.2%, and is currently being rolled out to GitHub Copilot individual users;

    The image model MAI Image 2.5 has been integrated into PowerPoint and is planned to be extended to OneDrive;

    The transcription model MAI Transcribe 1.5 supports 43 languages;

    The speech model MAI Voice 2 supports 15 languages and can adapt voices through short samples.

In terms of hardware, Microsoft released the Surface RTX Spark Dev Box for developers, which Nadella called a "dream machine." 硬件方面，微软发布面向开发者的 Surface RTX Spark Dev Box，纳德拉将其称为「dream machine（梦中神机）」。

The device is based on the NVIDIA RTX Spark platform, offering 1 petaflop of AI computing power, 20 CPU cores, and 128GB of unified memory, with a thermal design power of 100W, and is planned for release this fall. NVIDIA CEO Jensen Huang stated via video link that PCs are evolving from personal computers to "personal AI." 该设备基于英伟达 RTX Spark 平台，提供 1 petaflop AI 算力、20 个 CPU 核心和 128GB 统一内存，热设计功耗 100W，计划于今年秋季推出。英伟达 CEO 黄仁勋通过视频连线表示，PC 正从个人电脑向「个人 AI」演进。

Microsoft also showcased two types of reference devices codenamed Project Solara: 微软同时展示了代号 Project Solara 的两类参考设备：

    A desktop workstation based on MediaTek chips, supporting identity recognition, voice interaction, and Microsoft 365 Copilot access;

    A digital badge using Qualcomm wearable chips, designed for mobile work scenarios such as healthcare and field data collection.

item.title: OpenAI 扩展 Codex 生态：插件覆盖投行、数据分析等 6 大方向
item.guid: OpenAI-扩展-Codex-生态：插件覆盖投行、数据分析等-6-大方向
item.description:
During yesterday's "Intelligence at Work" live event, OpenAI officially announced that it will integrate Codex's core capabilities directly into the ChatGPT application within the next few weeks, allowing users to directly invoke Codex's execution capabilities within ChatGPT. 在昨天的「Intelligence at Work」直播活动上，OpenAI 官宣，未来几周内将 Codex 的核心能力直接整合进 ChatGPT 应用，让用户在 ChatGPT 里直接调用 Codex 的执行能力。

OpenAI also announced several functional extensions for Codex, introducing role-specific plugins, Sites shared website functionality, and annotation features, extending its use cases from software development to broader knowledge work domains. OpenAI 还宣布对 Codex 进行多项功能扩展，推出角色专属插件、Sites 共享网站功能及标注功能，将使用场景从软件开发延伸至更广泛的知识工作领域。

Official data shows that Codex's weekly active users have exceeded 5 million, with non-developer users accounting for approximately 20% of the total, growing more than 3 times faster than developer users. 官方数据显示，Codex 每周活跃用户已超过 500 万，其中非开发者用户占整体约 20%，增速超过开发者用户的 3 倍。

    Role-specific plugins: 6 plugins launched, integrating 62 applications and 110 skills, covering data analysis, creative production, sales, product design, public market equity investment, and investment banking. More directions such as corporate finance, private equity, and legal will be launched later, with plans to open up a partner ecosystem;

    Sites: Preview open to Enterprise and Business users, supporting the generation of interactive web pages from analysis results and solution plans that can be shared via URL, with continuously updatable content. OpenAI has engaged in early collaborations with platforms such as Vercel, Figma, Replit, and Webflow;

    Annotation feature: Previously limited to code and website scenarios, it has now been extended to documents, spreadsheets, and presentations. Users can select content and provide modification instructions, and Codex will make targeted adjustments to the selected area.

Role-specific plugins are currently being rolled out gradually in supported regions, and the Sites feature can be enabled by enterprise administrators in the backend settings. 角色专属插件目前正在支持地区逐步推出，Sites 功能企业管理员可在后台设置中启用。

item.title: 腾讯云下调 DeepSeek-V4 系列模型价格，最高降幅 97.5%
item.guid: 腾讯云下调-DeepSeek-V4-系列模型价格，最高降幅-97.5%
item.description:
Tencent Cloud announced that its intelligent agent development platform will reduce the prices of the DeepSeek-V4 series models starting today, with a maximum reduction of 97.5%. 腾讯云发布公告，旗下智能体开发平台将于今日起，对 DeepSeek-V4 系列模型价格进行下调，最高降幅达 97.5%。

Specifically, the inference input and inference output prices for the DeepSeek-V4-Pro model have both been reduced by 75%, dropping from 0.012 yuan and 0.024 yuan per thousand tokens to 0.003 yuan and 0.006 yuan, respectively; 具体来看，DeepSeek-V4-Pro 模型的推理输入与推理输出价格均下调 75%，分别从每千 tokens 0.012 元、0.024 元降至 0.003 元、0.006 元；

The cache hit price saw the largest reduction, dropping from 0.001 yuan per thousand tokens to 0.000025 yuan, a decrease of 97.5%. For the DeepSeek-V4-Flash model, this adjustment only involves the cache hit price, which decreased from 0.0002 yuan per thousand tokens to 0.00002 yuan, a 90% reduction. 缓存命中价格降幅最大，从每千 tokens 0.001 元降至 0.000025 元，降幅达 97.5%。DeepSeek-V4-Flash 模型此次调整仅涉及缓存命中价格，从每千 tokens 0.0002 元降至 0.00002 元，降幅为 90%。

item.title: Alphabet 拟融资 800 亿美元投入 AI 基建
item.guid: Alphabet-拟融资-800-亿美元投入-AI-基建
item.description:
According to Bloomberg, Google's parent company Alphabet plans to raise a total of $80 billion in equity financing, with the proceeds to be used for AI infrastructure, computing power construction, and related capital expenditures. 据彭博社报道，Google 母公司 Alphabet 计划进行总额 800 亿美元的股权融资，所得资金将用于 AI 基础设施、算力建设以及相关资本支出。

This financing consists of three parts: a $30 billion underwritten public offering, a $40 billion at-the-market offering of Class A or Class C shares, and a $10 billion direct private investment by Berkshire Hathaway. The company also stated that a portion of the net proceeds from the ATM program will be used to cover tax obligations related to employee equity award vesting. 这笔融资由三部分组成：300 亿美元包销公开发行、400 亿美元按市值发行 A 类或 C 类股票，以及伯克希尔・哈撒韦以私募方式直接投资 100 亿美元。公司还表示，ATM 计划净收益的一部分将用于处理员工股权奖励归属相关税务义务。

Alphabet had previously raised its capital expenditure forecast for this year to $180 billion to $190 billion and expects capital expenditures to continue to increase significantly next year. Alphabet 此前已把今年资本开支预期提高至 1800 亿至 1900 亿美元，并预计明年资本支出继续显著增加。

item.title: 徕卡相机或被中国资本收购
item.guid: 徕卡相机或被中国资本收购
item.description:
According to Bloomberg, Asian investment firm HSG (Sequoia China's main entity) is currently in the lead in the bidding to acquire the 45% stake in Leica Camera AG held by Blackstone Group. 据彭博社报道，亚洲投资机构 HSG（红杉中国主体）目前在收购黑石集团所持有的徕卡相机（Leica Camera AG）45% 股份的竞标中处于领先地位。

Sources revealed that HSG is negotiating with Blackstone Group to acquire the latter's 45% stake in Leica. If Austrian billionaire Andreas Kaufmann decides to sell, HSG is also interested in acquiring his remaining 55% stake and may eventually seek to push for Leica's re-listing. 知情人士透露，HSG 正与黑石集团进行谈判，计划收购后者持有的徕卡 45% 股权。若奥地利亿万富翁安德烈亚斯·考夫曼（Andreas Kaufmann）决定出售，HSG 亦有意收购其手中剩余的 55% 股份，并最终可能寻求推动徕卡重新上市。

According to a Bloomberg report in January this year, Leica's overall valuation is approximately 1 billion euros (about 1.2 billion US dollars). Deliberations are currently ongoing, and there is no definitive conclusion on whether a final agreement will be reached. A formal announcement may take several weeks to be released. 据彭博社今年 1 月的报道，徕卡的整体估值约为 10 亿欧元（约合 12 亿美元）。目前相关审议仍在进行中，最终协议能否达成尚无定论，正式公告或需数周时间方能发布。

item.title: 字节 Seed 机器人团队转向周畅汇报
item.guid: 字节-Seed-机器人团队转向周畅汇报
item.description:
According to LatePost, ByteDance's Seed system recently adjusted the reporting structure of its robotics team: the Seed Robotics team, originally led by Li Hang, has been reporting to Zhou Chang, head of multimodal AI, for over a month. Li Hang now serves as an advisor for academic cooperation. 据《晚点 LatePost》报道，字节跳动 Seed 体系近期调整机器人团队汇报线：原由李航负责的 Seed Robotics 团队已向多模态负责人周畅汇报月余，李航现以顾问身份负责学术合作方向。

Zhou Chang is one of the core R&D leaders for ByteDance's Seed AI. After joining ByteDance in 2024, he has primarily been responsible for Seed's multimodal interaction and world model directions. The report cited sources close to ByteDance, stating that robotics-related work was previously handled by multiple teams responsible for hardware, data, and models, leading to overlapping capabilities in model R&D during execution; after the adjustment, robotics R&D resources are further concentrated under Zhou Chang's management. 周畅是字节 Seed AI 研发核心负责人之一，2024 年加入字节后主要负责 Seed 的多模态交互和世界模型等方向。报道援引接近字节的人士称，机器人相关工作此前由多个团队分别承担硬件、数据、模型等任务，执行过程中在模型研发上存在能力重叠；调整后，机器人研发资源进一步集中到周畅管理范围内。

ByteDance is also recruiting a technical lead for embodied AI, responsible for the overall planning of the robotics business. The position is designated as L8, benchmarked against Alibaba's P10-P11, and reports to Zhou Chang. Candidates for the position primarily come from technical leads at leading embodied AI startups. 字节还在招聘具身智能技术负责人，负责机器人业务整体规划，职级定位为 L8，对标阿里 P10-P11，并向周畅汇报。岗位候选人主要来自头部具身智能创业公司技术负责人。

The report mentioned that Zhou Chang's responsibilities in multimodal interaction and world models are highly relevant to the technical requirements of Robotics: robots need vision, multimodal capabilities, and world models to understand real-world environments, and robotic scenarios can also provide real-world interaction data such as warehouses, factories, and homes for models. 报道提到，周畅负责的多模态交互、世界模型方向与 Robotics 的技术需求高度相关：机器人需要视觉、多模态和世界模型来理解现实环境，机器人场景也能为模型提供仓库、工厂、家庭等真实世界交互数据。

item.title: Codex 免费账号配额缩水，7 天重置周期变 30 天
item.guid: Codex-免费账号配额缩水，7-天重置周期变-30-天
item.description: Recently, OpenAI adjusted the quota reset period for Codex free accounts and Go subscription accounts from 7 days to 30 days (1 week to 5 weeks), further exacerbating the already limited quota. Plus, Pro, Business, Edu, and Enterprise users still have weekly resets. 近日，OpenAI 调整 Codex 免费账号与 Go 订阅账户的额度重置周期，从 7 天变为 30 天（1 周变 5 周），原本就不充裕的配额雪上加霜。Plus、Pro、Business、Edu 和 Enterprise 用户仍为每周重置。

item.title: 阿里 CTO 吴泽明进入阿里合伙人委员会，即时零售继续收拢到淘宝闪购
item.guid: 阿里-CTO-吴泽明进入阿里合伙人委员会，即时零售继续收拢到淘宝闪购
item.description:
Caixin reported that Alibaba Group CTO Wu Zeming has joined Alibaba's highest decision-making body, the Partnership Committee. Following this adjustment, the members of the Alibaba Partnership Committee include Jack Ma, Joe Tsai, Eddie Wu, Jiang Fan, and Wu Zeming. 财新报道，阿里巴巴集团 CTO 吴泽明进入阿里最高决策层合伙人委员会。本次调整后，阿里合伙人委员会成员包括马云、蔡崇信、吴泳铭、蒋凡及吴泽明。

Meanwhile, Shao Xiaofeng, who joined the Partnership Committee in 2023, has withdrawn from the committee upon reaching 60 years of age and will no longer serve as an Alibaba partner; he will continue to serve as Alibaba Group Secretary-General and Chairman of the Risk Management Committee. 同时，2023 年进入合伙人委员会的邵晓锋因年满 60 周岁退出委员会，并不再担任阿里合伙人；他将继续担任阿里巴巴集团秘书长和风险管理委员会主席。

Alibaba's partnership system was designed and launched by Jack Ma after 2010, incorporating core executives and heads of major business units into the partnership. Jack Ma and Joe Tsai are the only two permanent partners, neither retiring nor leaving; the Partnership Committee effectively holds the right to nominate more than half of the board seats. 阿里合伙人制度由马云在 2010 年后设计推出，核心高管和主要业务部门负责人被纳入合伙人体系。马云和蔡崇信是其中唯二永久合伙人，不退休、不离任；合伙人委员会实际掌握董事会半数以上席位的提名权。

Separately, according to LatePost, several Alibaba insiders believe that the change in Yan Xiaolei's reporting line is an important signal that Hema is about to be merged into the China Digital Commerce Group. 另据晚点 LatePost 报道，多位阿里人士认为，严筱磊汇报线变化是盒马即将并入中国电商事业群的重要信号。

The report stated that Alibaba's core management has identified instant retail as a key battleground for long-term investment and is pushing for the unification of brands and user perception for businesses such as Hema, Tmall Supermarket, Taobao Flash Sale, and pharmaceuticals under Taobao Flash Sale. 报道称，阿里核心管理层已把即时零售视为长期投入的核心战场，正在推动盒马、天猫超市、淘宝闪购、医药等业务的品牌和用户心智统一收归到淘宝闪购之下。

item.title: OpenAI 与 AWS 合作正式落地：GPT-5.5、GPT-5.4 与 Codex 上线 Amazon Bedrock
item.guid: OpenAI-与-AWS-合作正式落地：GPT-5.5、GPT-5.4-与-Codex-上线-Amazon-Bedrock
item.description:
AWS announced that OpenAI GPT-5.5, GPT-5.4, and Codex are now generally available on Amazon Bedrock, allowing enterprise customers to invoke OpenAI's cutting-edge models and code agents within their existing AWS security, compliance, and governance workflows. AWS 宣布，OpenAI GPT-5.5、GPT-5.4 与 Codex 已在 Amazon Bedrock 正式可用，企业客户可以在 AWS 现有安全、合规和治理工作流中调用 OpenAI 前沿模型和代码智能体。

Currently, GPT-5.5 is live in the US East (Ohio) region, and GPT-5.4 covers both the US East (Ohio) and US West (Oregon) regions; Codex, as a software development code agent, has entered Bedrock. OpenAI officially stated that Daybreak will also enter the AWS ecosystem for secure code review, threat modeling, patch validation, dependency risk analysis, and detection and repair recommendations. 目前，GPT-5.5 在美国东部俄亥俄区域上线，GPT-5.4 覆盖美国东部俄亥俄和美国西部俄勒冈区域；Codex 作为软件开发代码智能体进入 Bedrock。OpenAI 官方同步称，Daybreak 也会进入 AWS 生态，用于安全代码审查、威胁建模、补丁验证、依赖风险分析和检测修复建议。

item.title: Arm 称自研 AI 芯片 150 亿美元收入目标可能提前完成
item.guid: Arm-称自研-AI-芯片-150-亿美元收入目标可能提前完成
item.description: According to Bloomberg, Arm CEO Rene Haas stated that driven by the AI boom, the company might achieve its goal of $15 billion in self-developed chip sales revenue earlier than planned. Haas said he is "very confident" that Arm will reach this goal before the end of the decade, and also sees signs that the goal might be completed ahead of schedule. 据彭博社报道，Arm CEO Rene Haas 表示，受 AI 热潮推动，公司可能早于原计划实现自研芯片销售收入 150 亿美元的目标。Haas 称，他对 Arm 在本十年末前达到这一目标「非常有信心」，同时也看到目标可能提前完成的迹象。

item.title: 滴滴一季度由盈转亏
item.guid: 滴滴一季度由盈转亏
item.description:
Yesterday, Didi released its financial results for the first fiscal quarter of 2026, with revenue of 58.7 billion RMB and a net loss attributable to the parent company of 1.22 billion RMB. In the same period last year, the net profit attributable to the parent company was 546 million RMB. 昨日，滴滴发布 2026 财年第一财季业绩，期内营收为 587 亿元人民币，归母净亏损 12.20 亿元，上年同期为归母净利润 5.46 亿元。

    China Mobility Business: Average daily transactions reached a record high of 39.4 million orders, with GTV reaching 85.769 billion RMB, a year-on-year increase of 9.9%. Platform revenue was 19.587 billion RMB, a year-on-year increase of 22.2%, and Non-IFRS adjusted EBITDA profit was 3.967 billion RMB, an increase of 800 million RMB year-on-year;

    International Business: GTV reached 37.575 billion RMB, a significant year-on-year increase of 59.5%, and platform revenue was 2.930 billion RMB, a year-on-year increase of 17.0%.

item.title: 影翎 AG 官宣吴克群为全景无人机首席体验官
item.guid: 影翎-AG-官宣吴克群为全景无人机首席体验官
item.description:
Yingling AG announced yesterday that Kenji Wu has been appointed as the Chief Experience Officer for panoramic drones. The two parties will collaborate on public life, charity events, and panoramic flight experiences. 影翎 AG 昨日官宣，吴克群出任全景无人机首席体验官，双方后续会围绕大众生活、公益现场和全景飞行体验展开合作。

Yingling AG positions itself as a panoramic drone brand, aiming to transform drones from professional aerial photography tools into simpler, more immersive daily recording devices. Its A1 flagship panoramic drone features 8K panoramic flight. 影翎 AG 将自身定位为全景无人机品牌，希望把无人机从专业航拍工具推向更简单、更沉浸的日常记录设备。其 A1 旗舰全景无人机主打 8K 全景飞行。

item.title: 💡 山姆 · 奥特曼承认错误：拥抱 AI 最积极的公司仍在招聘
item.guid: 💡-山姆-·-奥特曼承认错误：拥抱-AI-最积极的公司仍在招聘
item.description:
According to Business Insider, OpenAI CEO Sam Altman stated in a CNBC interview yesterday that among the sample of large enterprises he has encountered, companies with the deepest AI adoption are actually hiring on a large scale ; while those companies that announced layoffs citing AI are often the slowest to implement AI. 据《商业内幕》报道，OpenAI CEO Sam Altman 昨日在 CNBC 采访中指出，在他所接触的大型企业样本中， AI 采用程度最深的公司，反而正在大规模招聘 ；而那些以 AI 为由宣布裁员的公司，往往是 AI 落地最慢的一批。

Altman stated that AI can be a "convenient excuse" for companies to explain layoffs, but this does not align with the actual application of the technology. He also admitted that his judgment on AI's impact on employment is becoming more optimistic, due to observing that companies using OpenAI programming tools like Codex have not experienced the expected job shrinkage. Altman 表示，AI 可以成为企业解释裁员的「便利借口」，但这与技术实际应用情况并不相符。他同时承认，自己对 AI 影响就业的判断正在变得更为乐观，原因是观察到企业在使用 OpenAI 编程工具 Codex 等产品后，并未出现预期中的岗位萎缩。

He attributes this phenomenon to the inherent limitations of large models— 他将这一现象归因于大模型自身的局限性——

These models perform extremely well in certain tasks, but are completely incapable of supervised execution of long-term, complex tasks.

Altman also expressed regret over OpenAI's previous public relations statements. He pointed out that a press release about GPT-5.2 in December last year claimed the model "surpassed professionals in 44 occupations," a phrasing that was too broad and caused unnecessary public anxiety. Altman 还就 OpenAI 此前的公关表述表示遗憾。他指出，去年 12 月一份有关 GPT-5.2 的新闻稿声称该模型「在 44 个职业中超越专业人士」，措辞过于笼统，引发了不必要的公众焦虑。

We should say that it surpasses professionals in sub-tasks across 44 occupations, which is a more accurate statement.

item.title: 一加 Turbo 6X 系列证件照曝光
item.guid: 一加-Turbo-6X-系列证件照曝光
item.description:
The specifications and official photos of the OnePlus Turbo 6X and Turbo 6X Pro have been revealed, with model numbers PYS110 and PYR110 respectively. Both models are expected to continue targeting the mid-range performance market, featuring high refresh rate screens, large batteries, and fast charging combinations. 一加 Turbo 6X 和 Turbo 6X Pro 的规格与证件照已经曝光，型号分别为 PYS110 与 PYR110。两款机型预计继续面向性能中端市场，采用高刷新率屏幕、大电池和快充组合。

In terms of configuration, the OnePlus Turbo 6X is expected to feature a 6.72-inch FHD+ LCD screen with 144Hz refresh rate support; it will be equipped with a MediaTek Dimensity 7400 Apex chip; battery capacity will be 7000mAh; and it will use side-mounted fingerprint recognition. 配置方面，一加 Turbo 6X 预计搭载 6.72 英寸 FHD+ LCD 屏幕，支持 144Hz 刷新率；配备联发科天玑 7400 Apex 芯片；电池容量为 7000mAh；采用侧边指纹识别。

The OnePlus Turbo 6X Pro, on the other hand, will feature a 6.78-inch 1.5K AMOLED screen, equipped with a Qualcomm Snapdragon 7s Gen 4 mobile platform; battery capacity will be increased to 8000mAh, and it will use under-display fingerprint recognition. 一加 Turbo 6X Pro 则搭载 6.78 英寸 1.5K AMOLED 屏幕，配备高通骁龙 7s Gen 4 移动平台；电池容量提升至8000mAh，采用屏下指纹识别。

item.title: 优世界官宣全球首款全尺寸超仿生人形机器人
item.guid: 优世界官宣全球首款全尺寸超仿生人形机器人
item.description: Yesterday, UWorld officially announced the world's first full-size hyper-bionic humanoid robot, available in both male and female versions, officially launching on June 30th. 昨天，优世界官宣全球首款全尺寸超仿生人形机器人，提供男女双款，6 月 30 日正式上市。

item.title: 罗技发布 K828 有线背光机械键盘
item.guid: 罗技发布-K828-有线背光机械键盘
item.description:
Logitech yesterday released the K828 wired backlit mechanical keyboard, targeting office workers and content creators, featuring a mechanical feel, low-latency input, and AI shortcut operations. 罗技昨日发布 K828 有线背光机械键盘，定位办公人群和内容创作者，主打机械手感、低延迟输入和 AI 快捷操作。

In terms of appearance, the K828 uses ABS double-shot keycaps, floating switches, a metal top cover, and a silver-grey color scheme. The support feet offer three angles: 0, 4, and 8 degrees. The backlight provides five modes: breathing, random, wave, reactive, and always-on, and supports 7 levels of brightness adjustment. 外观方面，K828 使用 ABS 双色注塑键帽、悬浮轴体、金属上盖和银灰色配色，支撑脚架支持 0 度、4 度和 8 度三档角度。背光部分提供呼吸、随机、波浪、随动、常亮五种模式，并支持 7 档亮度调节。

    Features a compact 98-key layout, retaining the numeric keypad, arrow keys, and function keys;

    Equipped with linear crystal shafts, supports 1000Hz polling rate, with a response speed of approximately 1ms;

    Supports Logi Options+ custom shortcut keys, allowing one-click launch of AI tools or switching personal workflows.

item.title: 微星发布 RTX Spark 迷你主机 EdgeMesa N AI+
item.guid: 微星发布-RTX-Spark-迷你主机-EdgeMesa-N-AI+
item.description:
Following the release of NVIDIA's RTX Spark superchip, MSI launched the EdgeMesa N AI+ mini PC, featuring a compact industrial design with 4 USB-C, 1 HDMI, and 1 RJ45 port on the rear. 微星在英伟达 RTX Spark 超级芯片发布后，推出 EdgeMesa N AI+ 迷你主机，采用紧凑工业风外观，后部提供 4 个 USB-C、1 个 HDMI 和 1 个 RJ45 接口。

MSI states that the EdgeMesa N AI+ wired network port supports 10GbE and can achieve quad-screen output via HDMI and three 20Gbps USB-C ports. The product is designed for space-constrained scenarios such as medical, retail, finance, robotics, and smart cities, emphasizing I/O expansion, connectivity, and thermal stability under high loads. 微星称，EdgeMesa N AI+ 有线网口支持 10GbE，可通过 HDMI 和 3 个 USB-C 20Gbps 实现四屏输出。产品面向医疗、零售、金融、机器人和智慧城市等空间受限场景，强调 I/O 扩展、连接能力和高负载下的散热稳定性。

The RTX Spark superchip itself features a 20-core CPU, 6144 CUDA Blackwell GPU, up to 128GB unified memory, and up to 1 petaflop FP4 sparse AI computing power. Compared to a regular mini PC, the EdgeMesa N AI+ is more like a small workstation for local agent and edge AI deployment. RTX Spark 超级芯片本身具备 20 核 CPU、6144 CUDA Blackwell GPU、最高 128GB 统一内存，以及最高 1 petaflop FP4 稀疏 AI 算力。相比普通迷你 PC，EdgeMesa N AI+ 更像面向本地 Agent 和边缘 AI 部署的小型工作站。

item.title: 任天堂发布 Nintendo Music 更新：PC 网页端上线、支持 CarPlay
item.guid: 任天堂发布-Nintendo-Music-更新：PC-网页端上线、支持-CarPlay
item.description:
Nintendo announced an update to its Nintendo Music streaming platform, adding a "song recommendation" feature, while also improving the mobile app and launching a PC web version. 任天堂宣布更新 Nintendo Music 流媒体音乐平台，新增「歌曲推荐」功能，并同步改进移动端 App、上线 PC 网页端。

The newly added recommendation feature automatically generates recommended playlists based on music the player has listened to and games they have played in the past, and re-recommends different tracks daily. 本次新增的推荐功能会根据玩家过去收听过的音乐和游玩过的游戏，自动生成推荐播放列表，并每天重新推荐不同曲目。

For mobile, the Nintendo Music App now supports Apple CarPlay and Android Auto car connectivity, allowing voice input to play music in car mode. Nintendo also launched a PC web version, enabling users to play Nintendo Music on large computer screens or other device browsers. 移动端方面，Nintendo Music App 新增支持苹果 CarPlay 和 Android Auto 车机互联，在车机模式下可使用语音输入播放音乐。任天堂还上线 PC 网页版，让用户可以在电脑大屏或其他设备浏览器中播放 Nintendo Music。

Nintendo Music officially launched in 2024 and requires a Nintendo Switch Online membership to use, covering soundtracks from Nintendo games and character songs. Nintendo Music 于 2024 年正式推出，需要 Nintendo Switch Online 会员才能使用，内容覆盖任天堂旗下游戏配乐和角色歌曲。

item.title: 瑞幸回应 HelloKitty 打错成「HeeloKitty」
item.guid: 瑞幸回应-HelloKitty-打错成「HeeloKitty」
item.description:
According to China Newsweek, netizens in multiple regions recently posted that some plush keychains from the Luckin Coffee x Hello Kitty "Children's Day Special" collaboration merchandise had spelling errors on their tags, with the classic logo "HELLO KITTY" mistakenly printed as "HEELO KITTY" (i.e., "L" was mistakenly printed as "E"). 据中新经纬报道，日前多地网友发帖称，瑞幸咖啡与 Hello Kitty 的「六一特辑」联名周边中，部分毛绒挂件的标签上存在拼写错误，经典标识「HELLO KITTY」被错印成「HEELO KITTY 」（即把「L」误印成了「E」）。

It is understood that the limited-edition collaboration merchandise launched by Luckin this time includes plush keychains, phone lanyards, tattoo stickers, mugs, badges, and more. 据了解，此次瑞幸推出的联名限定周边包括毛绒挂件、手机挂链、纹身贴纸、马克杯、徽章等。

The report stated that a Luckin Coffee store in Xicheng, Beijing, said that the store had not received such feedback, and if such a situation was encountered, customers would need to call Luckin Coffee's official customer service hotline to process a refund. "The store does not have refund authority, and all plush keychains at the store have sold out today, so direct replacement is not possible." 报道称，北京西城一家瑞幸咖啡门店表示，目前门店没有接到该类反馈，如遇到该情况需要打瑞幸咖啡官方客服电话操作退款，「门店没有退款权限，并且门店毛绒挂件今天已经全部卖光了，没办法直接更换。」

Luckin Coffee's official customer service also stated that they have received notification that a batch of goods indeed had this issue. "Consumers can provide their order phone number, and we will contact the ordering store to help replace it with a new one. If the store is out of stock, a full refund for the entire order can be directly applied for." 瑞幸咖啡官方客服也表示，目前已经接到通知，确实有一批货出现了这个问题。「消费者可以提供下单手机号，我们这边联系下单门店帮忙更换一个新的。如果门店如果没货，可以直接申请退款整单商品。」

item.title: 哈根达斯中国内地门店授权给含柠季在内的投资者集团
item.guid: 哈根达斯中国内地门店授权给含柠季在内的投资者集团
item.description:
According to Yicai, on June 1 local time, General Mills reached a definitive agreement with an investor group to license its Häagen-Dazs store business in mainland China to the investor group, which includes Ningji. 据第一财经报道，当地时间 6 月 1 日，通用磨坊已与投资者集团达成最终协议，将其在中国内地的哈根达斯门店业务授权给包含柠季在内的投资者集团。

Upon completion of the transaction, the investor group will receive an exclusive license from General Mills to use the Häagen-Dazs brand in ice cream shops and gift businesses in mainland China. General Mills will continue to own and operate Häagen-Dazs' retail and food service businesses in China. 交易完成后，该投资者集团将获得通用磨坊授予的独家许可，可在中国内地的冰淇淋店和礼品业务中使用哈根达斯品牌。通用磨坊会继续拥有并运营哈根达斯在中国的零售和餐饮业务。

The transaction is expected to be completed within the year. For Häagen-Dazs, the core change is that its mainland China stores will switch from direct operation or the original operating system to authorized operation by local investors. The store and gift businesses will be handed over to a team more familiar with the local consumer market, while packaged retail and food service channels will remain with General Mills. 这笔交易预计年内完成。对哈根达斯而言，中国内地门店从直营或原有运营体系切换到本土投资者授权运营，核心变化在于门店和礼品业务将交给更熟悉本地消费市场的团队推进，而包装零售和餐饮渠道仍留在通用磨坊手中。

item.title: 多家银行补贴微信提现手续费
item.guid: 多家银行补贴微信提现手续费
item.description:
According to Jiemian News, several banks have recently launched WeChat withdrawal subsidy activities, linking free withdrawal limits to conditions such as mobile banking agreements and average daily balance of debit card current deposits. 据界面新闻报道，多家银行近期推出微信提现补贴活动，把免费提现额度与手机银行签约、借记卡活期存款日均余额等条件绑定。

Among the participating banks, Guangxi Rural Commercial United Bank launched the "WeChat Pay Withdrawal Savings" mini-program, where cardholders have the chance to randomly receive exclusive withdrawal coupons worth 1666 yuan or 6666 yuan, used to offset withdrawal service fees. Each user can claim a maximum of 3 coupons per denomination, with a daily limit of 1 coupon. 参与银行中，广西农商联合银行推出「微信支付提现笔笔省」小程序，持卡人有机会随机领取 1666 元或 6666 元面额的专属提现券，用于抵扣提现服务费，同一用户每个面额最多可领 3 张，每日限领 1 张。

Hengnan Rural Commercial Bank and Yongxing Rural Commercial Bank, on the other hand, link the subsidy amount to the deposit size, with the monthly subsidized withdrawal limit for customers being twice the average daily balance of the linked debit card's current deposits from the previous month. 衡南农商银行和永兴农村商业银行则将补贴额度与存款规模挂钩，客户当月可补贴的提现额度为签约借记卡上月活期存款日均余额的 2 倍。

item.title: 霉霉为《玩具总动员 5》创作原创单曲，周五发行
item.guid: 霉霉为《玩具总动员-5》创作原创单曲，周五发行
item.description:
Taylor Swift (霉霉) has written and performed an original single "I Knew It, I Knew You." for Pixar's new film "Toy Story 5," with the song set to be released this Friday (June 5). 泰勒·斯威夫特（霉霉）为皮克斯新片《玩具总动员5》创作并演唱了一首原创单曲「I Knew It, I Knew You.」，歌曲将于本周五（6 月 5 日）发行。

The song revolves around the cowgirl character Jessie, recounting her memories with her first owner, Emily. Andrew Stanton, director of "Toy Story 5," stated that Swift "immediately understood and resonated" with the character after encountering her, calling the song "a long-lost member of the Toy Story family, it's destiny." 该曲围绕女牛仔角色杰茜展开，讲述她与第一任主人艾米莉之间的回忆。《玩具总动员5》导演安德鲁·斯坦顿表示，斯威夫特在接触这一角色后「立马就理解并产生了共鸣」，并称这首歌「感觉像是《玩具总动员》家庭失散已久的一名成员，这都是天命。」

"Toy Story 5" is currently scheduled for simultaneous release in mainland China and North American markets on June 19. 《玩具总动员5》目前定档中国内地及北美市场 6 月 19 日同步上映。

item.title: 《末日地堡》第三季预告发布，7 月 3 日开播
item.guid: 《末日地堡》第三季预告发布，7-月-3-日开播
item.description:
Rebecca Ferguson's Apple TV+ sci-fi series "Silo" (originally titled "Wool") released a new teaser trailer for its third season yesterday, themed "One Step Closer to the Truth," with the series set to officially premiere on July 3. 丽贝卡·弗格森主演的苹果 Apple TV+ 科幻剧集《末日地堡》（原名《羊毛战记》）昨日发布第三季新先导预告，以「距离真相更进一步」为主题，剧集定于 7 月 3 日正式开播。

"Silo" is adapted from Hugh Howey's sci-fi novel series of the same name, telling the story of humanity surviving in a giant underground bunker. The previous two seasons were exclusively broadcast on Apple TV+. 《末日地堡》改编自休 · 豪伊同名科幻小说系列，讲述人类在地下巨型地堡中生存的故事，此前两季均在 Apple TV+ 平台独家播出。
